Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.procedures

Class MergeWithPredicateAbstraction

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.MergeProcedure
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.procedures.MergeWithLatticeAbstraction
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.procedures.MergeWithPredicateAbstraction
All Implemented Interfaces:
ParametricMergeProcedure
Direct Known Subclasses:
MergeWithPredicateAbstractionFactory
public class MergeWithPredicateAbstraction extends MergeWithLatticeAbstraction
Rule that merges two sequents based on a lattice of user-defined predicates. This procedure is no singleton since the set of predicates has to be defined for each merge application.

  • Nested Class Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • MergeWithPredicateAbstraction

      protected MergeWithPredicateAbstraction()
      Default constructor for subclasses.

    • MergeWithPredicateAbstraction

      public MergeWithPredicateAbstraction(Iterable<AbstractionPredicate> predicates, Class<? extends AbstractPredicateAbstractionLattice> latticeType, Map<ProgramVariable,AbstractDomainElement> userChoices)
      Creates a new instance of MergeWithPredicateAbstraction. This MergeProcedure cannot be a Singleton since it depends on the given list of predicates!
      Parameters:
      predicates - The predicates for the created lattices.
      latticeType - The concrete lattice type which determines how abstract elements are generated from abstraction predicates.

  • Method Details

    • complete

      public boolean complete()
      Description copied from class: MergeProcedure
      Similar to AbstractBuiltInRuleApp.complete(). Method was introduced for predicate abstraction (which is not complete if the abstraction predicates are not set).
      Overrides:
      complete in class MergeWithLatticeAbstraction
      Returns:
      true iff the merge procedure is complete (all neede parameters are set).

    • getAbstractDomainForSort

      public AbstractDomainLattice getAbstractDomainForSort(Sort s, Services services)
      Description copied from class: MergeWithLatticeAbstraction
      Returns the abstract domain lattice for the given sort or null if there has no lattice been specified for that sort.
      Specified by:
      getAbstractDomainForSort in class MergeWithLatticeAbstraction
      Parameters:
      s - The sort to return the matching lattice for.
      services - The services object.
      Returns:
      The abstract domain lattice suitable for the given sort. Return null if there is no abstract domain for that sort; in this case, an if-then-else merge will be performed.

    • instantiateAbstractDomain

      public static AbstractDomainLattice instantiateAbstractDomain(Sort s, List<AbstractionPredicate> applicablePredicates, Class<? extends AbstractPredicateAbstractionLattice> latticeType, Services services)
      Instantiates the abstract domain lattice for the given sort or null if there has no lattice been specified for that sort.
      Parameters:
      s - Sort of for elements in the lattice.
      applicablePredicates - AbstractionPredicates for all sorts.
      latticeType - Type of AbstractPredicateAbstractionLattice.
      services - The Services object.
      Returns:
      The corresponding AbstractDomainLattice.

    • getPredicates

      public HashMap<Sort,ArrayList<AbstractionPredicate>> getPredicates()
      Returns:
      The predicates for the abstraction.

    • setPredicates

      public void setPredicates(HashMap<Sort,ArrayList<AbstractionPredicate>> predicates)
      Parameters:
      predicates - The abstraction predicates (map from program variables to formula terms).

    • addPredicate

      public void addPredicate(AbstractionPredicate predicate)
      Adds a new predicate to the set of abstraction predicates.
      Parameters:
      predicate - The predicate.

    • addPredicates

      public void addPredicates(Iterable<AbstractionPredicate> predicates)
      Adds a new predicate to the set of abstraction predicates.
      Parameters:
      predicates - The predicates to set.

    • getLatticeType

      public Class<? extends AbstractPredicateAbstractionLattice> getLatticeType()
      Returns:
      The type of lattice, that is a subclass of AbstractPredicateAbstractionLattice which determines how abstract elements are constructed from abstraction predicates.

    • getUserChoices

      public LinkedHashMap<ProgramVariable,AbstractDomainElement> getUserChoices()
      Specified by:
      getUserChoices in class MergeWithLatticeAbstraction
      Returns:
      Manually chosen lattice elements for program variables.
